contract_meta.rationale: Safely extract logical domains from the modular monolith (`src/server.ts`) in small, verified slices with zero behavior change and green gates after every slice.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Refactor the monolith into domain modules without breaking APIs or tests.
project.scope: Extract 6 domains: clarify, progress, execute, sessions, fixtures, files. Keep feature flags and endpoints unchanged.

execution_model.description: After each slice: lint + typecheck + tests must pass. If any fail, halt and fix before proceeding.

constraints.apis: No breaking changes to existing endpoints

actions.content_spec: Copy exact code lines 389–420 from src/server.ts (clarificationSessions map + purge/remember/consume helpers). Export rememberClarificationQuestions and consumeClarificationQuestions.
Add import: import { rememberClarificationQuestions, consumeClarificationQuestions } from './domains/clarify/session.js';
Delete lines 389–420 (moved helpers).

Create mountClarifyRoutes(app: express.Express) that contains the exact code from src/server.ts lines 1542–1572; import respondWithProblem, detectMissing, generateQuestions, validateClarificationRequest, rememberClarificationQuestions, consumeClarificationQuestions. Export mountClarifyRoutes.
Add import: import { mountClarifyRoutes } from './domains/clarify/routes.js'; Then call mountClarifyRoutes(app) near other route registrations.
Delete lines 1542–1572 (moved route).

Create mountProgressRoutes(app: express.Express, deps: { openProgressStream: Function; getProgress: Function }) that contains exact code from lines 2314, 2320, 2330; replace direct calls with deps.openProgressStream and deps.getProgress where used. Export mountProgressRoutes.
Add import: import { mountProgressRoutes } from './domains/progress/routes.js'; Then call mountProgressRoutes(app, { openProgressStream, getProgress }).
Delete lines 2314, 2320, 2330 (moved routes).

actions.cmd: npm run -s lint && npm run -s typecheck && npm -s test

tasks.title: Extract Execute helpers (745–846, 807–...)

actions.content_spec: Copy exact helpers used by /api/execute: lines 745 (isComplexPrompt) block; 807 (captureFixture) block; any additional pure helpers referenced inside 1577–1872 (e.g., collectPlanGeneratedFiles at 799, createPlanExecutionContext at 816–825, executePlanFlow at 912–1127 if used externally). Export symbols with identical names.
Add imports from './domains/execute/helpers.js' for all moved helpers. Remove the original helper blocks that were moved.

success_criteria: Helpers compile and tests remain green

actions.content_spec: Create mountExecuteRoutes(app: express.Express, deps: { stepQueue: StepQueue }) that contains exact code from 1577–1872 with no behavior changes. Import from existing modules where present: orchestrator/graph.buildExecutionId, orchestrator/graph.runWithLangGraph, orchestrator/graph.createExecution/failExecution; orchestrator/abortSignal (createAbortSignal, cleanupAbortSignal, abortSession); respondWithProblem; fixtures/index (readFixture/writeFixture); planning types; utils; plus helpers from './helpers.js'. Use injected deps.stepQueue instead of the local variable. Export mountExecuteRoutes.
Add import: import { mountExecuteRoutes } from './domains/execute/routes.js'; Then replace inline route with: mountExecuteRoutes(app, { stepQueue });
Delete lines 1577–1872 (moved route).

Create mountSessionRoutes(app: express.Express, deps: { getProgress: Function; ensureOrchestrationSession: Function; getOrchestrationSession: Function; normalizeResumeAnswers: Function; buildResumePrompts: Function; resumeFromCheckpoint: Function; PausedError: any; createAbortSignal: Function; cleanupAbortSignal: Function; abortSession: Function; setProgress: Function; readFixture: Function; writeFiles: Function; ensureDefaultExportForApp: Function; runInSandbox: Function; captureManifest: Function; getManifest: Function; resolveSessionPrompts: Function; stepQueue: StepQueue }) and move exact code blocks: 2000–2101 (pause) and 2103–2312 (resume), adjusting references to use deps.* where needed. Export mountSessionRoutes.
Add import: import { mountSessionRoutes } from './domains/sessions/routes.js'; Then call mountSessionRoutes(app, { ...inject required functions..., stepQueue });
Delete lines 2000–2312 (moved routes).

actions.cmd: npm run -s lint && npm run -s typecheck && npm -s test

actions.content_spec: Create mountFixtureRoutes(app: express.Express) and move exact blocks: 1873–1895 (/api/run-tests), 1898–1908 (/api/fixtures/:project), 1911–1960 (/api/replay/repair and /api/replay/subtask), 1963–1997 (/api/plan endpoints). Import runInSandbox, listFixtures, readFixture, writeFiles, ensureDefaultExportForApp, logEvent, slugify, fs, path, OUTPUT_DIR as needed from existing modules. Export mountFixtureRoutes.
Add import: import { mountFixtureRoutes } from './domains/fixtures/routes.js'; Then call mountFixtureRoutes(app).
Delete lines 1873–1997 (moved routes).

Create mountFileRoutes(app: express.Express) and move exact blocks: 447 (/healthz), 450–458 (/api/executions/:id), 461–557 (/output-archive), 560–673 (/output listing), 2336–2363 (/api/files/:project/:path(*)). Import required utilities (fs, path, slugify, OUTPUT_DIR, createReadStream, set headers) from existing modules. Export mountFileRoutes.
Add import: import { mountFileRoutes } from './domains/files/routes.js'; Then call mountFileRoutes(app).
